methodology: Primary official source confirmed only the Ministry HQ address and general hotline.
Branch-level military registration center addresses were compiled from 08.ge military office directory pages.
Batumi and Kobuleti were additionally cross-checked against 2GIS listings.
Entries sourced from 08.ge or 2GIS should be treated as provisional until the MOD or the national conscription agency publishes an official branch directory.

global_contact.official_address_en: 20 General G. Kvinitadze St., 0112 Tbilisi, Georgia
